title: UpdateStudyResponse

name.description: A user-friendly display name of the Study.

status.description:
A one-character string which specifies the status of the Study:
  • a: Archived
  • p: Coding in progress
  • c: Completed
  • d: Deleted
  • h: On hold
  • r: Review in progress
  • s: Shipping
  • u: Under construction

supervisorKey.description: The key of the Person who will do revision of coding work

supervisorAssociateKey.description: The key of the supervisor's associate

clientCompanyKey.description: The Company to which this Study is assigned, or null if the Study is not assigned to a Company.

endCompanyKey.description: The key of the Company for which this coding work is being performed

help.description: Information to coders to assist in coding this Study.

createDateUtc.description: The UTC date/time the Study was created.

startDateUtc.description: UTC date/time the Study was started.

dueDateUtc.description: UTC date/time the Study was completed.

countQuestions.description: The number of Questions in the Study.

countResponses.description: The sum of the number of Responses in each Question in the Study.

countResponsesCoded.description: The sum of the number of Responses to which at least one Code has been assigned in each Question in the Study.

countTransactions.description: The number of transactions used by this Study.  Transactions are tokens of work performed on the Study.

description: The response with data of created study.
